title: German Frittata with Fennel and Croation Sausage
description: A hearty German-inspired frittata loaded with flavors of Croatia and crunchy fennel.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, heat butter over medium heat.
3. Add chopped onions and cook until translucent, 5 minutes.
4. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
5. Add sliced fennel and cook until tender, 5 minutes.
6. Add Croatian sausage, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned, 5 minutes.
7. In a large bowl, whisk together beaten eggs, salt, and black pepper.
8. Pour egg mixture over the skillet contents and cook until eggs start to set, 2-3 minutes.
9. Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until eggs are set.
10. Remove from oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley. Serve hot.
